title: Sacrificial Lamb
lines: In a moment of arrogance and exhaustion, you sit atop the ancient stone altar in the center of the Mad Shrine.
The green stone beneath you begins to heat up rapidly, glowing with a nauseating light.
You try to stand, but you are frozen to the altar as the non-Euclidean symbols on the walls begin to scream.
Your life is drained into the hungry stone.

options.desc: Wake up back at the tent
